title: Verify hotel search by popular location (minimum 10 hotel cards must appear)
reason: Searching the popular destination Bangkok loaded a results page displaying 12 hotel cards, satisfying the minimum of 10.

title: Verifying sorting the results based on price
reason: After sorting by 'Lowest price' the results were ordered ascending (lowest price first), but the expected result requires the highest price first in descending order.

bug_details.title: Sorting by 'Lowest price' does not display results highest price first in descending order
bug_details.description: On the Agoda hotel search results page for Bangkok, selecting the 'Lowest price' sort option arranges hotels in ascending order with the cheapest property at the top (observed sequence of nightly prices: 6, 7, 7, 7, 7, 7, 8, 8, ..., 9). According to the test case's expected result, the results should instead be shown with the highest price first and then descending, which does not occur.
steps_to_reproduce: Search for the destination 'Bangkok' and open the results page
Open the 'Sort by' control and select 'Lowest price'
Observe the order of the displayed hotel prices from top to bottom
bug_details.expected_result: The results are shown with the highest price first and then in descending order.
bug_details.actual_result: The results are shown with the lowest price first in ascending order (e.g., 6, 7, 7, 8, 9), i.e., not highest-price-first descending.
